[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010100000 2
1 001000000 1
2 110000000 2
3 000110000 2
4 100000001 2
5 010100001 3
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

12 21 010010000 2
23 32 000010000 1

45 54 000101001 3
56 65 000000001 1
67 76 000000001 1
70 07 010000000 1

24 42 010100000 2 match 0
35 53 000010001 2
46 64 100000001 2 match 4

60 06 000000000 a match 6 7
71 17 010000000 1

50 05 000001100 2
61 16 100000000 1

37 73 000000001 1
